cards.back: A statistical method used to establish a relationship between two or more variables, predicting an outcome based on one or more input variables.
A type of regression analysis that models the relationship between a dependent variable and one or more independent variables using a linear equation.
A type of linear regression that models the relationship between a dependent variable and multiple independent variables.
A type of regression analysis that models the relationship between a dependent variable and one or more independent variables using a polynomial equation of one or more degrees.

cards.front: What is the goal of Regression Analysis?
cards.back: To establish a mathematical relationship between variables, making predictions, and identifying patterns or trends in data.
